title: Bio-Regeneration only equips at 9 or less HP

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Can only be equipped to a creature with 9 or less remaining HP. Heal 30 HP. 2x Hit Roll results for this creature. 2x Atk Damage for this creature.

effect.value: Remaining HP must be 9 or less

plan.title: Bio-Regeneration only equips at 9 or less HP
plan.summary: Equip Bio-Regeneration to a creature at 5 HP and verify the valid low-HP equip proceeds and applies the linked on-equip heal.

notes: Set player_1 primary current hp to 5 before Bio-Regeneration resolves.
Bio-Regeneration can only be equipped to a creature with 9 or less remaining HP.

steps: Set player_1 primary creature current HP to 5.
Verify the equip was accepted and its immediate heal resolved.

expectedAssertions.label: Bio-Regeneration remains equipped/on field after valid low-HP target
Valid equip target receives the 30 HP heal
Equip requirement did not fall back to manual queue

manualVerification: A separate invalid branch should reject targets above 9 remaining HP.
riskNotes: This validates the allowed edge for 009-E01; existing Bio-Regeneration fixtures cover the heal and multipliers.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_009_bio_regeneration-009-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
